title: cirsium ibericum
intro: Cirsium ibericum, also known as the Iberian thistle or Iberian cirsium, is a species of thistle that belongs to the sunflower family, Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and relieving pain. The health benefits of Cirsium ibericum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and even have anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Cirsium ibericum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
